name: ⁠♡Your old childhood bestie⁠♡
description:
This would be my first bot lol.

I never thought I'd post any of my bots but I really loved chatting with this one and wondered if anyone else would find the same joy I did.

Sooo yeah!

Any feedback is welcome just don't be too rude and feel free to leave any requests if you want any more bits from me!
creator: Beanface23
